Hello. I'm here to help you forge a new identity and recover your center.

What is your body and mind feeling right now?

guia.title: Tester Guide
guia.intro: Thank you for testing Solen. This guide explains how to install the app and which flows to test.

install.title: Installation
items: Open the download link we shared with you.
If Android asks to enable "Install apps from unknown sources", enable it in Settings → Security.
Install the APK and open Solen.
Register with your email and a password (minimum 8 characters, at least one letter and one number).

flows.title: Flows to test
items: ① Registration and login — register, sign out and sign back in.
② Round One — tap "Round One" and complete the breathing protocol.
③ Morning Journal — complete the journal before noon.
④ Massive Action — start the round and verify the timer works.
⑤ Status protocol — move the slider and tap the protocol button.
⑥ Coach — send a message and wait for the AI response.
⑦ Pineal — start Round Three and complete the session.
⑧ Integrity Journal — complete it at the end of the day.
⑨ History — verify that the day's data appears.

bugs.title: How to report a bug
items: Describe what you did step by step.
Indicate what you expected to happen and what happened instead.
If possible, attach a screenshot.
Send us the report through the channel we indicated.

notes.title: Important notes
items: This is a test version — data may be reset between versions.
The AI Coach uses real credits, use it wisely.
If the app doesn't load data, check your internet connection.
If you find a crash, close and reopen the app before reporting.
